domain: marine engine service, boat deck hardware, rigging tools, bilge systems, and dock equipment

ideas.product_context: Marine mechanics need a stable bench fixture for handling removed outboard lower units during inspection, draining, seal work, and reassembly.
ideas.core_function: Support an irregular engine gearcase in several service orientations while keeping drain points, skeg, prop shaft area, and fastener zones accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured cradle frame with adjustable padded supports and clampable mounting base.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing asymmetric organic support contact, tilted service positions, clearance windows, and fixture adjustability without relying on simple block-like geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Portable Propeller Puller With Hub Guard
ideas.product_context: Boat yards often remove stubborn propellers from shafts while trying to avoid damage to blades, hubs, threads, and nearby running gear.
ideas.core_function: Apply controlled pulling force around a propeller hub while shielding vulnerable surfaces and keeping the tool centered on the shaft.
ideas.likely_main_part: Yoke-style puller body with protective hub cup and sliding reaction arms.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with radial symmetry, curved blade clearance, movable arms, nested protective surfaces, and force-path readability.

ideas.idea_title: Deck Cleat Load Spreader Backing Plate
ideas.product_context: Boat owners retrofit or service deck cleats where underside access is awkward and the deck laminate needs broader load distribution.
ideas.core_function: Spread cleat fastener loads below a deck while adapting to underside curvature and allowing tool access around nearby obstructions.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved backing plate with captive fastener features and edge relief cutouts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved thin-plate forms, underside installation constraints, countersunk or captive hardware features, and non-rectangular relief geometry.

ideas.product_context: Marine technicians replace flush deck hatch latches where alignment between the latch barrel, gasket compression, and strike plate is difficult to judge.
ideas.core_function: Hold hatch latch components in the correct relationship while marking, drilling, or checking gasket compression.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat alignment jig with recessed latch pocket, strike reference face, and gasket clearance gauge surfaces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines shallow recesses, planar datum references, gasket offset logic, and temporary installation geometry in a compact tool.

ideas.product_context: Sailboat rigging service involves installing and removing small safety clips on turnbuckles in tight deck or mast-base locations.
ideas.core_function: Guide a safety clip into a turnbuckle body while keeping fingers clear of sharp wire ends and confined fittings.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slim forked hand tool with clip-retaining groove and angled handle.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small retained-part geometry, narrow slots, angled access, ergonomic surfaces, and interaction with existing rigging hardware.

ideas.product_context: Boat service crews need a quick physical reference for checking repeatable rigging tension without full electronic instrumentation.
ideas.core_function: Deflect a wire rope in a controlled way and show a mechanical indication related to tension.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clamp-on gauge frame with wire saddles, spring-loaded deflection shoe, and pointer scale body.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves open-frame structure, cable contact saddles, moving indicator linkage, spring travel volume, and readable mechanical reference surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Bilge Pump Float Switch Debris Shield
ideas.product_context: Bilge compartments collect leaves, hair, wire ties, and service debris that can jam float switches and cause unreliable pump behavior.
ideas.core_function: Protect a float switch from debris while allowing free water flow and manual testing access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Perforated cage cover with snap-on base and hinged inspection flap.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests perforated protective geometry, hinge details, snap features, wet-environment access, and internal clearance for a moving float.

ideas.product_context: Marine installers route bilge discharge hose through cramped compartments where bends near bulkheads can restrict flow.
ideas.core_function: Guide a flexible hose through a smooth bend and secure it to a bulkhead without crushing or kinking.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved saddle bracket with hose-retaining straps and bulkhead mounting flange.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved path geometry, strap interfaces, flexible-hose clearance, flange orientation, and compact mounting features.

ideas.idea_title: Dock Line Chafe Guard With Quick Wrap
ideas.product_context: Dock lines rub against cleats, chocks, pilings, and rub rails, especially during changing tide or wake conditions.
ideas.core_function: Wrap around a dock line and provide a replaceable wear surface that stays positioned at the contact area.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flexible sleeve body with interlocking edge profile and textured outer wear surface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests flexible sleeve representation, partial cylindrical wrapping, interlocking edges, textured wear zones, and rope-contact behavior.

ideas.idea_title: Folding Dock Step With Wet-Grip Tread
ideas.product_context: Marinas and private docks often need a compact step that can fold away from walk paths while remaining usable with wet footwear.
ideas.core_function: Provide a fold-down stepping surface with secure traction and a lockable stowed position.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hinged tread platform with side brackets, latch detail, and molded grip pattern.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with moving hinge states, tread texture, lock geometry, load path through brackets, and stowed versus deployed envelopes.

ideas.product_context: Marine engine service includes removing clear separator bowls that can be slippery, fragile, and hard to access below filters.
ideas.core_function: Grip a filter bowl evenly for removal without point loading the transparent housing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cup-style wrench with scalloped inner grip ribs and offset handle socket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin cup geometry, internal rib patterns, fragile-part contact control, offset tool clearance, and service orientation.

ideas.idea_title: Stern Drive Bellows Clamp Positioning Tool
ideas.product_context: Stern drive bellows replacement requires placing clamps around flexible boots in crowded transom assemblies.
ideas.core_function: Hold and guide a clamp band into the proper seating area around a flexible bellows lip.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved clamp guide with hooked end, handle, and visual seating reference.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes curved approach geometry, interaction with flexible bellows, hidden seating references, and narrow access around adjacent hardware.

ideas.idea_title: Mast Base Wiring Drip Loop Organizer
ideas.product_context: Sailboat mast wiring often enters through deck glands where wires need strain relief and drip-loop organization to reduce leaks.
ideas.core_function: Organize cable loops and guide water away from entry glands while keeping service access clear.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile cable guide plate with staggered saddles and drainage channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests routed cable management, drainage geometry, low-profile deck fit, multiple passage paths, and serviceable clamp features.

ideas.product_context: Boat batteries need secure retention while allowing inspection, ventilation, and quick strap replacement in cramped lockers.
ideas.core_function: Provide a corrosion-resistant rail system for routing retention straps around a battery box without blocking lid access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Base rail with strap slots, raised standoffs, and corner guards.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines strap path modeling, raised supports, edge protection, access clearance, and load-bearing rail features.

ideas.product_context: Marina shore-power cables often hang from dock pedestals and need organized storage that avoids sharp bends and water pooling.
ideas.core_function: Hold coiled shore-power cable off the deck with a smooth support surface and drainage-friendly shape.
ideas.likely_main_part: Wall-mounted curved hanger with drip grooves and locking retaining lip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires large-radius support forms, retaining lips, drainage grooves, mounting bosses, and weight-bearing wall interface.

ideas.product_context: Marine refit work includes removing old sealant around through-hull fittings without gouging hull laminate or metal flanges.
ideas.core_function: Scrape cured bedding compound around circular fittings while following flange curvature and controlling blade depth.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved scraper head with replaceable blade pocket and depth-limiting shoe.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests circular-contact tooling, controlled blade projection, replaceable inserts, ergonomic handle angle, and surface-following geometry.

ideas.product_context: Bow anchor rollers wear, bend, or misalign, making it difficult to center the roller, pin, and chain path during replacement.
ideas.core_function: Temporarily align roller cheeks and chain path while a roller or pin is fitted.
ideas.likely_main_part: Removable alignment block with chain-groove reference and side cheek spacers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines channel geometry, removable fixture logic, nested clearances between side plates, and alignment references for rotating parts.

ideas.product_context: Deck scupper flaps degrade and are often serviced near curved transoms or cockpit drains where alignment affects sealing.
ideas.core_function: Hold a replacement flap and hinge strip in position while fasteners are started and sealant is applied.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved face fixture with flap pocket, hinge guide, and temporary clamp pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved sealing faces, flexible flap accommodation, hinge alignment, clamp pad placement, and wet-side drainage clearance.

ideas.idea_title: Marine Hose Clamp Torque Access Driver
ideas.product_context: Engine rooms contain hose clamps on coolant, fuel, and exhaust hoses that are hard to tighten consistently from awkward angles.
ideas.core_function: Reach clamp screws around hoses and fittings while keeping the driver aligned and limiting over-tightening.
ideas.likely_main_part: Offset driver head with guide sleeve, torque indicator body, and low-clearance handle.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves offset rotational axes, limited access envelopes, moving torque indicator features, and hose-adjacent clearance geometry.

ideas.product_context: Small boats sometimes need temporary tie-off points on swim platforms without permanent hardware changes.
ideas.core_function: Clamp to a platform edge and provide a temporary cleat surface with protective pads and anti-rotation features.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clamp-on cleat body with padded jaws and integrated horn shape.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests clamp jaw motion, soft pad interfaces, cleat horn geometry, anti-rotation surfaces, and removable load path representation.

ideas.product_context: Many bilge pumps use removable cartridges that can stick from grime, mineral deposits, or poor hand access.
ideas.core_function: Engage the pump cartridge tabs and apply twist leverage without breaking plastic pump features.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ring-shaped twist tool with internal drive lugs and raised grip wings.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with internal lug geometry, bayonet engagement logic, hand-grip forms, and clearance around pump housings.

ideas.product_context: Sailboat lifeline gates need repeatable latch alignment after stanchion service, cable replacement, or gate hardware changes.
ideas.core_function: Temporarily space and align gate latch parts while cable tension and terminal positions are adjusted.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clip-on spacer body with latch-reference pockets and cable clearance slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests slender clip features, cable pass-throughs, latch pocket geometry, temporary assembly references, and small hardware interaction.

ideas.product_context: Dock fenders are frequently repositioned for different hull shapes and mooring conditions without permanent dock modifications.
ideas.core_function: Clamp a fender line or fender body to a dock rail with quick repositioning and anti-slip grip.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cam clamp bracket with rounded rail saddle and line-retaining cleat.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves cam action, rounded rail contact, rope retention, textured grip pads, and variable dock rail profiles.

ideas.product_context: Raw-water pump impellers can be difficult to install because the flexible vanes must be folded into the pump cavity direction.
ideas.core_function: Compress and orient impeller vanes before insertion into a pump housing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split tapered sleeve with internal vane guides and release tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires representing flexible vane interaction, tapered internal surfaces, split tool behavior, and directional guide features.

ideas.product_context: Deck and cockpit drain strainers become stuck from sealant, corrosion, or debris and are often too flush to grip by hand.
ideas.core_function: Engage strainer slots and lift or rotate the insert without damaging surrounding gelcoat.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile pronged key with protective underside pad and cross handle.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests prong-slot engagement, shallow clearance, protective pad surfaces, rotational hand tool geometry, and delicate deck contact.

ideas.product_context: Canvas shops and owners install snap fasteners on uneven deck edges and need consistent placement relative to existing fabric snaps.
ideas.core_function: Transfer snap positions from cover fabric to deck hardware locations while accounting for edge curvature.
ideas.likely_main_part: Adjustable locator strip with snap-receiving sockets and deck marking tips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines adjustable indexing, small socket features, fabric-to-deck transfer geometry, and curved edge reference handling.

ideas.product_context: Dock ladders need replaceable feet that protect hulls, reduce dock wear, and adapt to uneven mounting surfaces.
ideas.core_function: Provide a cushioned standoff between a ladder leg and dock or hull-facing surface while resisting rotation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Molded foot pad with socket cup, ribbed contact face, and retention strap groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests soft pad geometry, socketed tubular interfaces, ribbed contact surfaces, strap grooves, and non-slip orientation features.

ideas.product_context: Service technicians inspect outboard engines with cowlings partially open, where latches and seals can be awkward to hold clear.
ideas.core_function: Prop and stabilize an engine cowling during latch, gasket, and wiring inspection.
ideas.likely_main_part: Articulating prop arm with soft end pads and quick-lock hinge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves articulated states, soft contact pads, hinge locking detail, irregular cowling contact, and service clearance representation.

ideas.product_context: Fuel, water, and waste deck fill caps can seize or become difficult to open without scratching polished deck hardware.
ideas.core_function: Grip a deck fill cap key pattern and provide leverage while protecting the surrounding deck ring.
ideas.likely_main_part: Round cap adapter with keyed underside, protective skirt, and folding leverage handle.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests keyed underside geometry, protective skirt clearance, folding handle states, rotational tool contact, and polished-surface protection.

ideas.product_context: Dockside washdown hoses and bibs often drip onto walkways or hang loosely from pedestals after use.
ideas.core_function: Hold a hose nozzle or bib tail upward and route residual water into a small drain path.
ideas.likely_main_part: Pedestal-mounted holster cup with angled rest, drain channel, and hose clip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled support, water drainage, cylindrical hose capture, wall mounting, and open cup geometry in a dock environment.
